title: Wire vault-to-Kioku sync pipeline
implementation_notes: Create sync.ts that exports syncReadModelToKioku(readModel, storage).
Internally call buildKiokuIndexUpdates(readModel) from indexer.ts, then call storage.upsert() for each update.
Sync must be idempotent: running twice on the same snapshot produces the same stored state.
Do not call any vault read/write — receive the already-loaded VaultReadModel as a parameter.
Wire the sync call into the read-model.get.ts handler so it syncs on every read-model load (or on demand).
acceptance_criteria: syncReadModelToKioku pushes all projects, boards, tasks, and approvals into storage.
Running sync twice on the same snapshot leaves storage in the same state (idempotent).
Sync does not touch vault markdown files.
No raw task body, executionNotes, result, or approval reason leaks into the index.
sync.ts and the wiring in read-model.get.ts are covered by unit tests.
completion_summary: Added syncReadModelToKioku with idempotent upserts, stale-document deletion, and optional read-model wiring guarded by environment.
